hooks.command: $json = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $f = $json.tool_input.file_path; if (-not $f) { $f = $json.tool_response.filePath }; if ($f -and ($f -notmatch 'docs.*\.md$') -and ($f -notmatch 'CLAUDE\.md$') -and ($f -notmatch 'README\.md$')) { $out = @{ hookSpecificOutput = @{ hookEventName = 'PostToolUse'; additionalContext = 'Reminder (CLAUDE.md): if this change alters requirements or design behavior, update docs/Requirements.md and/or docs/SDD.md and add a Change Log entry.' } }; $out | ConvertTo-Json -Compress }
